items.title: Watch: The Women's Football Show
items.summary: Highlights and analysis of all the action from the Women’s Super League.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Raghuvanshi adjudged out for obstructing the field during LSG-KKR IPL clash
items.summary: The 21-year-old Raghuvanshi became only the fourth batter in IPL history — all Indians — to be declared out in this fashion
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: London Marathon hails ‘greatest day’ as Sawe breaks two hours and records tumble
items.summary: Men’s and women’s-only world records fall Organisers hope record number will finish by midnight The London Marathon’s organisers have hailed the “greatest day” in the event’s 45...
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
